caption: A man with glasses, a groomed beard, and a tall, peaked grey wig sits in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and suspenders. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. The background is a wall decorated with various framed photographs and a mannequin torso wearing a white shirt. A black bag and a yellow garment with the word "LEE" are also visible behind him. Across the bottom of the frames, a logo featuring a microphone and the text "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" is displayed. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, shifting his facial expression slightly and moving his lips as he continues to speak, while the camera angle and background remain static.
